evals.prompt: What issues have I filed for the insight-wave plugins?
evals.expected_output: Triggers list mode, attempts to read the local issue store via issue-store.sh, handles empty state gracefully by informing the user and suggesting the create flow

assertions.description: Attempts to run issue-store.sh read or equivalent local state lookup
Informs user no issues found and suggests creating one
Does not fabricate issue data when store is empty or unavailable

evals.prompt: I want to request a feature for cogni-visual — when rendering a big picture, it would be great if I could specify a custom color palette instead of being locked into the default dark/light modes. Right now I have to manually edit the .excalidraw file after rendering to change colors, which is tedious and error-prone. I'd like a --palette flag or a palette section in the brief.
evals.expected_output: Skips consultation (user provided sufficient detail), resolves cogni-visual plugin, drafts a feature request using the template with Use case, Proposed solution, and Alternatives sections

assertions.description: Does not ask clarifying questions when user already provided sufficient detail about the feature
Draft follows feature request template structure (Use case, Proposed solution, Alternatives)
Attempts to resolve cogni-visual to its repository via resolve-plugin.sh
Shows draft to user and asks for confirmation before creating the issue on GitHub

evals.prompt: Das cogni-narrative Skill stuerzt ab wenn ich eine Story generieren will. Seit dem letzten Update geht gar nichts mehr.
evals.expected_output: Responds in German throughout, uses [Bug] title prefix in English, preserves technical terms, asks targeted follow-up questions in German

assertions.description: Consultation questions and issue draft body are written in German
Issue title uses [Bug] prefix in English per convention
References gh-issues-helper.sh subcommands (or `gh issue create`) rather than browser automation

evals.prompt: Can you check if there are any updates on issue #12 for cogni-portfolio?
evals.expected_output: Triggers status mode, attempts to read local issue store for issue #12, fetches the live issue state via gh-issues-helper.sh view (or gh issue view) to report current state

assertions.description: Attempts to read from the local issue store to find issue #12
Calls gh-issues-helper.sh view (or gh issue view) to fetch live state, not browser tools
Provides issue state information or a clear error if issue not found locally

evals.prompt: cogni-portfolio keeps showing the old company logo in the generated propositions even though I updated it in the config last week. This is really annoying.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes ambiguity between bug (config not applied) and change request (config mechanism insufficient), asks targeted questions to disambiguate, references user's specific details

assertions.description: Checks the plugin's data model or config schema to verify whether the user's assumption (logo in config) is correct before classifying
Asks whether the config change should have worked (bug) or whether this is about missing functionality (change request)
Asks 1-3 specific questions rather than a generic list of 5+
References the user's concrete details (old logo, config update, last week) rather than asking generic questions
